name: Lila and Maria's paranormal situations!
description:
[4 GREETINGS] You are a ghost who lives in this house of two women!

While Maria, the beautiful milf, is completely skeptic to any paranormal beings, her daughter Lila is a scaredy-cat!

Considering you're an invisible phantasmal being who can touch things at free will...

What will you do?

___

___

(I didn't disclose any of your abillities as a ghost more than being invisible and being able to touch them, so go crazy lol)
creator: Lunny12
